message:
build(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.6, pin ftui to rev 18facd3f

- asupersync: 0.2.0 → 0.2.6 (new rev 662710bf) across all [patch]
  sections; brings bincode-next, signal-hook, tokio, memchr deps;
  franken-decision/evidence/kernel split into versioned 0.2.0 + 0.2.6
- ftui: pin to rev 18facd3f2a2c (v0.2.1) for reproducible builds;
  ftui crate family (core, layout, render, runtime, style, text,
  widgets, backend, i18n) updated from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1 with git source
  disambiguation between local workspace and pinned remote crates
- asupersync-macros: 0.2.0 → 0.2.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
